def cmd_use_rich(session_id: str):
    """
    Forge wrapper for rich 15.0.0
    Generated by forge-tool-wrap via qwen3:8b
    """
    from agents.forge.memory import write_audit_entry
    import rich

    rich.print("[bold magenta]Rich Features Demo[/bold magenta]")
    rich.print("Styled text, colors, and formatting are supported.")
    rich.print("This is a [green]sample[/green] output using rich.")

    write_audit_entry(session_id, 'USE_RICH_EXECUTED', '-', '-', 'ran')
